text.title: Freelance Rate Jump Tactics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for Freelance Rate Jump Tactics.

step.name: research-market-band
step.input: New niche; ≥3 sources (rate cards, peer survey)
step.action: Collect median + p75 for the niche.

step.name: verify-case-studies
step.action: Confirm ≥3 published case studies with measurable outcomes.
step.decision-gate: If <3, STOP — produce more before jumping.

step.name: set-target-rate
step.action: Target rate at median to p75. Avoid above p75 without exceptional case studies.

step.name: schedule-graduated-rollout
step.action: New leads from new-rate date; existing clients from existing-rate date (≥60d later). WIP at old rate.

step.name: send-notice-and-publish
step.action: Send written notice to existing clients ≥60 days before. Publish new rate card to new-lead surfaces.
